properties.remark: WHITMAN COUNTY SHERIFF DISPATCH REPOTED FLASH FLOODING BETWEEN OAKSDALE AND TEKOA. NUMEROUS REPORTS RECIEVED OF CARS STRANDED ON AREA ROADS. FIRST REPORT ARRIVED AROUND 550 PM.
HEAVY RAINS CREATED WATER ON ROADWAYS UP TO TOP OF TIRE ON CARS.
SOCIAL MEDIA POST FROM PUBLIC REPORTED 0.92 INCHES OF RAIN IN OAKSDALE AND FLASH FLOODING EAST OF OAKSDALE WITH PHOTO OF FLOODING OVER A ROADWAY.
